subject: Requesting refund — item arrived damaged
body: I received my order (ELEC-HDMI4K-BLK-US) on May 12th and the cable was clearly crushed in transit. The box was dented and the connector head is bent. I have photos. I'd like a full refund or a replacement.
resolution_notes: Verified damage via customer photos. Issued full refund of $24.99. Refund will post in 5-7 business days. Offered replacement at no charge — customer declined.

subject: Refund denied — but policy says 14 days
body: I bought a router on April 28th and it stopped working on May 16th. That's 18 days after purchase. Your agent Emily said my return window was 14 days and refused the refund. Your website says 14 days but I thought you had a longer window now?
resolution_notes: Customer was incorrectly quoted the old 14-day policy. Current policy (v3.0, effective April 1) gives 30 days. Escalated to Marcus Williams. Approved refund under current policy. Flagged Emily for retraining on updated policy.

subject: Package not delivered — tracking shows delivered
body: My order (tracking: 1Z999AA10123456784) shows delivered on May 10th but I never received it. I checked with neighbors and building management. Nothing.
resolution_notes: Carrier investigation initiated. UPS confirmed GPS coordinates show delivery at incorrect address. Replacement order shipped with expedited delivery at no charge. Original loss claim filed with UPS.

subject: Wrong item received
body: I ordered OFFC-PEN-BLUE-US (box of 12 blue pens) and received OFFC-PEN-RED-US instead. Order #ORD-88821. Please send the correct item.
resolution_notes: Confirmed fulfillment error. Sent correct item via expedited shipping at no charge. Customer may keep the incorrect item. Flagged fulfillment team.

subject: Charged twice for one order
body: My credit card statement shows two charges of $89.99 from Acme on May 15. I only placed one order. Order number ORD-90122.
resolution_notes: Confirmed duplicate charge due to a payment processor timeout causing a retry. Second charge voided. Customer will see credit in 3-5 business days. Escalated to Tom Bradley for payment processor incident report.

subject: Product stopped working after 3 weeks
body: I bought a wireless keyboard (ELEC-KB-WLSS-US) three weeks ago and the scroll lock key is now stuck. It's under warranty but I'm not sure how to proceed for a repair or replacement.

subject: Want to return — changed my mind
body: I bought a standing desk mat on May 28th and I've decided it's not the right size for my workspace. Can I return it? I haven't used it, still in packaging.
resolution_notes: Within 30-day window, item unopened. Approved return. Customer to ship back within 7 days using provided prepaid label (item over $50 threshold). Refund issued upon receipt.

subject: Shipping took 14 days — asked for 5-7
body: I paid for standard shipping with a 5-7 business day estimate. My package arrived on business day 14. I want compensation for the delay.
resolution_notes: Confirmed SLA breach — 14 business days vs. 5-7 guaranteed. Refunded shipping fee ($4.99) and issued $15 credit toward next order per shipping SLA breach policy. Customer satisfied.

subject: Software license not working — need refund
body: I purchased the SOFT-SUITE-PRO license on June 2nd. I activated it immediately but the software crashes on startup. I would like a full refund.
resolution_notes: Software license activated — per policy, digital licenses are non-refundable once activated. Escalated to Tier 2 (Marcus Williams) due to technical failure claim. Marcus confirmed crash is a known compatibility issue with Windows 11 v24H2. Issued full refund as exception given documented software defect. Flagged product team.

subject: Coupon code LAUNCH2026 not applying
body: I'm trying to use the coupon code LAUNCH2026 but it's saying it's invalid. I'm a new customer setting up a Growth tier account.
resolution_notes: Verified customer is eligible (new account, Growth tier). Bug in coupon validation for Growth tier was preventing application. Manually applied 20% discount for Year 1. Flagged engineering — ticket #ENG-4421 opened.

subject: International shipment held at customs
body: My order to the UK has been at UK customs for 8 days. Tracking shows 'awaiting customs clearance'. I've already paid £45 in duties. How long does this usually take?

subject: TechCorp — billing dispute on May invoice
body: Our May invoice shows $24/seat for 150 seats ($3,600 total). Based on our account agreement I expected the standard Enterprise rate. Please review and send a corrected invoice.

subject: Refund after 30 days — extenuating circumstances
body: I purchased a laptop stand on April 25th and just got back from a medical emergency (hospital stay). I haven't opened the package. Is there any way to get a refund even though it's been 36 days?
resolution_notes: Customer provided hospital documentation. Per policy, Tier 2 can extend window by 14 days for documented medical emergencies. Approved refund under extension (36 days is within 30+14=44 day extended window). Issued full refund.

subject: Order canceled but already shipped
body: I submitted a cancellation request at 1:45 PM EST but my order shipped at 2:15 PM according to the email. I don't want the item — can I still refuse delivery?
resolution_notes: Cancellation received after the 2 PM cutoff — shipment cannot be recalled. Customer advised to refuse delivery or accept and return under standard 30-day policy. Return label pre-issued for convenience.

subject: API rate limit too low for our integration
body: We're on Enterprise tier and our automated sync is hitting the 1,000 req/hour limit constantly. We need at least 3,000 req/hour to run our daily reconciliation job without throttling.

subject: Product listing description inaccurate
body: The ELEC-HDMI4K-BLK-US listing says 'compatible with all HDMI 2.0 ports' but it does not work with my Dell monitor's HDMI 2.0 input. The cable only negotiates HDMI 1.4 speeds. This is false advertising.
resolution_notes: Customer claim verified — listing was inaccurate. Full refund issued (item not as described). Product listing flagged for correction. Escalated to product team.

subject: Subscription auto-renewed without notice
body: My annual subscription renewed on June 1st for $192. I received no renewal reminder email. I want to cancel and get a refund for the unused portion.

subject: Requested expedited shipping but got standard
body: I paid $12.99 for expedited 2-3 day shipping and it took 6 days. I need a refund of the shipping upgrade cost.
resolution_notes: Confirmed expedited shipping was charged but standard handling used by fulfillment center. Refunded difference ($12.99 - $4.99 = $8.00). Flagged fulfillment team.

subject: Bundle return — only one item defective
body: I purchased the HOME-DESK-BUNDLE-US (desk + chair + lamp). The lamp is defective — it flickers badly. Can I return just the lamp?
resolution_notes: Per bundle policy, partial returns only accepted for defective items. Lamp defect confirmed via photos. Issued replacement lamp at no charge. Bundle not required to be returned in full.

subject: Account access issue — locked out
body: I've been locked out of my account for 3 days. I've tried resetting my password but never receive the reset email. I have orders in progress I cannot track.
resolution_notes: Password reset emails were routing to spam at customer's corporate mail gateway. Sent manual temporary password via phone verification. Advised IT to whitelist acme-noreply@acme.com.

subject: Dispute — discount not applied to invoice
body: Our sales rep Lisa Nakamura told us we'd get 15% off our Growth tier for Year 1. The invoice I received shows full price at $16/seat. Order ORD-91200.
resolution_notes: Confirmed with Lisa Nakamura — 15% discount was verbally approved but not logged in Salesforce before the invoice was generated. Jake Torres approved the credit note. Corrected invoice issued at $13.60/seat. Flagged Lisa for Salesforce logging compliance.

subject: Product arrived but packaging damaged
body: My ELEC-MONITOR-27IN-US arrived with significant packaging damage but the monitor itself appears okay. Should I refuse to keep it? I'm worried it might have hidden damage.
resolution_notes: Advised customer to test monitor thoroughly within the 30-day window. If any defect found, full replacement authorized. Photos of packaging damage logged. Carrier damage claim filed.

subject: Final sale item — can I still return it?
body: I bought a headset marked as final sale last month and it broke after one week. It seems unfair that final sale items can't be returned even when defective.
resolution_notes: Final sale items are not returnable per policy unless defective. Customer provided evidence of failure within 7 days of purchase. Defect confirmed. Exception approved — issued replacement unit. Final sale exception requires Tier 2 approval (Marcus Williams approved).

subject: Checkout error — order stuck in processing
body: I placed an order 4 hours ago (ORD-92441) and it's been stuck on 'processing' ever since. My card was charged. What's happening?
resolution_notes: Order stuck due to intermittent inventory service timeout bug (see ENG-4500). Manually pushed order through fulfillment system. Order shipped same day. Customer notified with tracking number.

subject: VIP account — SLA not being met
body: We are a VIP account (Nexus Analytics, $180K ARR) and submitted a support request 6 hours ago with no response. Our contract guarantees a 1-hour response SLA.
resolution_notes: SLA breach confirmed — 6-hour response for a VIP account violates contract. Escalated immediately to Sarah Chen. Roberto Leal called customer directly. Root cause: ticket was not flagged as VIP in the system. CRM tagging corrected. Sarah Chen issued formal apology and $500 service credit.

subject: Return window question — is it 14 or 30 days?
body: Your FAQ still says 14 days but a friend told me it's now 30. Which is correct? I have an item from May 20th I might want to return.
resolution_notes: Confirmed the return window is 30 days effective April 1, 2026. Customer's item (May 20) is well within the window. Advised customer they can return until June 19. Also flagged FAQ team — this is the third ticket this week about confusion from outdated FAQ.

subject: Non-profit discount not being applied
body: We are a registered 501(c)(3) and should be receiving the NONPROFIT coupon discount (30%). I submitted our documentation three weeks ago and still haven't seen any adjustment.

subject: Item ordered in wrong color — can I exchange?
body: I ordered OFFC-CHAIR-ERGN-BLK-US (black) but I meant to order the grey variant. Haven't opened the box. Can I exchange?
resolution_notes: Exchange approved — within 30-day window, item unopened. Sent prepaid return label. Grey variant (OFFC-CHAIR-ERGN-GRY-US) dispatched same day so customer is not without a chair during return transit.

subject: Bulk order — can I get a volume discount?
body: We want to order 200 units of OFFC-PEN-BLUE-US for our office. Do you have volume pricing? Our total would be around $600.
resolution_notes: Routed to Lisa Nakamura (Sales). Lisa offered 10% volume discount (within her 15% authority). Customer accepted. Custom quote created in Salesforce.

subject: Item out of stock after order placed
body: I placed an order for ELEC-WEBCAM-HD-US two days ago and just got an email saying it's out of stock and my order is on hold. How long is the hold and can I cancel for a refund instead?
resolution_notes: Inventory confirmed out of stock with 2-week restock ETA. Customer opted to cancel rather than wait. Full refund issued immediately. Customer notified of restock alert signup option.
